frames.name: panel-08-step-pose-shine-hit-nano-banana-2
frames.prompt: Edit the provided Switchlight hook-stage image into the next storyboard frame. Keep the same fictional LUMINA group, same faces, same hair, same pearl pink/chrome/black wardrobe family, same chrome stage, same pearl light panels, and same reflective black floor. Move the group from the hook hand gesture into a clean synchronized 'Step, pose, shine' hit after one forward step. Rae stays center. Jia and Nari look sharper and more athletic. Sena and Yumi frame the sides. Make it a premium vertical 9:16 K-pop music-video keyframe. No text, logos, products, beauty claims, real celebrity likeness, or copied choreography.

frames.name: panel-09-final-switchlight-pose-nano-banana-2
frames.prompt: Edit the provided Switchlight hook-stage image into the final storyboard frame. Keep the same fictional LUMINA group, same faces, same hair, same pearl pink/chrome/black wardrobe family, same chrome stage, same pearl light panels, and same reflective black floor. The group holds a confident final Switchlight pose under fully activated pearl/chrome lights. Rae is calm center, Jia angled and confident, Sena luminous, Nari grounded, Yumi warm. Chrome arches frame them like an opened doorway. Make it a premium vertical 9:16 K-pop music-video keyframe. No text, logos, products, beauty claims, real celebrity likeness, or copied choreography.
